positive: Minimalist illustration of a majestic forest spirit creature, depicted as a sleek, stylized fox blending into glowing bioluminescent flora. The fox's silhouette should be clean and elegant, with subtle trails of light forming its tail and ears. The surrounding jungle elements—moss, giant ferns, and luminous mushrooms—should frame the central figure without distracting from it. Use a limited, harmonious color palette dominated by deep emerald greens, sapphire blues, and glowing teal accents. Emphasize clean outlines, strong contrast between the dark forest background and the bright, glowing subject. Ideal for repeat or center-chest apparel printing. Detailed vector art style, symmetrical composition, studio lighting, photorealistic quality, high contrast, crisp lines, clean vector illustration.
negative: blur, low quality, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, watermark, signature, artifacts, noise, realistic photo, busy background, grunge, messy lines
